loop.label: Enter dress room
loop.system_response: Show 2D base character and freeplay chrome in current orientation
loop.feedback: Avatar + categories visible; no text wall modal

loop.label: Pick item
loop.system_response: Equip 2D layer on slot (or clear if toggled)

loop.label: Compose look
loop.system_response: Maintain one item per slot with fixed draw order

loop.label: Pick theme
loop.player_action: Open theme picker and choose a prompt
loop.system_response: Set active theme tags for Fake Show scoring and UI banner
loop.feedback: Short theme label on stage (icon + few words)

loop.label: Fake fashion show
loop.system_response: Play single-player runway with NPC rivals, fake crowd, computed stars
loop.feedback: Runway walk, rival cards, star tally, podium; no network wait
loop.notes: Rivals are seeded/fake; scores are local algorithms + juice

loop.label: Restyle after show
loop.player_action: Return to dress room and change outfit
loop.system_response: Preserve catalog progress; suggest same or new theme
loop.feedback: Quick path back to freeplay; reason to equip more items

loop.label: Screenshot share
loop.system_response: Save or present shareable image when platform allows
loop.feedback: Clear success toast; never block core loop if share fails
